concerns.text: Task T017 (Extract time-series) is listed after T013 (Preprocessing) but before T020 (Connectivity Matrix). However, T017 depends on the output of T013 (cleaned NIfTI) AND the Schaefer atlas (not explicitly defined as a prior task). More critically, T020 (Connectivity Matrix) depends on T017 (Time-series), but T020 is in Phase 4 while T017 is in Phase 3. This is correct, BUT T017 description says 'apply motion regression' which implies a dependency on T015 (Motion parameter validator) which is in the same phase. Ensure T015 completes before T017 logic executes. The bigger issue: T017 is marked [P] (parallel) but it consumes the output of T013 (Preprocessing) which is NOT marked [P] and is a sequential dependency. T017 cannot be parallel with T013.

Task T023 (PCA on network metrics) is listed in Phase 4, but PCA requires the output of T021 (Graph metric extractor) and T022 (Aggregation logic). T021 and T022 are in the same phase, which is fine, but T023 is marked [P] (parallel). PCA cannot run in parallel with the extraction of the metrics it aggregates. T023 must be sequential to T021/T022. Additionally, T023 depends on T021/T022 completing, so it cannot be parallel with them.

Task T024 (Correlation with FD covariate) depends on T023 (PCA) if the PCA factor is used, OR on T021/T022 if individual metrics are used. The spec (FR-004) requires correlation for 'each network metric', but the plan introduces PCA. If T024 uses the PCA output, it depends on T023. If it uses individual metrics, it depends on T021/T022. The task description is ambiguous, but T024 is marked [P] (parallel). Correlation analysis cannot be parallel with the metric extraction (T021/T022) or PCA (T023) it consumes. T024 must be sequential.

Task T025 (FDR correction) depends on the output of T024 (Correlation results). T025 is marked [P] (parallel). FDR correction cannot run in parallel with the correlation analysis it corrects. T025 must be sequential to T024.

Task T026 (CI calculation) depends on T024 (Correlation results). T026 is marked [P] (parallel). CI calculation cannot run in parallel with the correlation analysis it uses. T026 must be sequential to T024.

Task T031 (Scatter plot) depends on T024/T025 (Correlation results and significance). T031 is marked [P] (parallel). Visualization cannot run in parallel with the analysis it visualizes. T031 must be sequential to the analysis phase.

Task T032 (Network diagram) depends on T024/T025 (Significant findings). T032 is marked [P] (parallel). Network diagram generation cannot run in parallel with the analysis it visualizes. T032 must be sequential to the analysis phase.

Task T033 (Report generator) depends on T031, T032, T026, and T025 (all analysis and visualization outputs). T033 is NOT marked [P], which is correct, but the dependency chain is not explicitly clear in the task list. Ensure T033 is scheduled after all T031, T032, T026, T025 complete.

Task T010 and T011 (Tests for US1) are marked [P] and placed before T012-T017 (Implementation). The 'Independent Test' section for US1 states 'The pipeline can be fully tested by executing the download and preprocessing scripts...'. This implies the tests are integration tests that run the implementation. If T010/T011 are contract tests (mocking HCP), they can be parallel. If they are integration tests running the actual code, they must be sequential to T012-T017. The description says 'Contract test' and 'Integration test for preprocessing quality', which suggests T011 might need the implementation. Clarify if T011 can run without T013-T015 implementation, or if it must be sequential.
